blocks.title: DeterministicFollowUps
rows: Define the calculation method for CLV and how it is used in reporting.

rawData.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.

resultPayload.note: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.

evidence.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
evidence.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for Customer Lifetime Value (CLV), but the evidence provided only includes average CLV figures by source without a comprehensive analysis or confirmation of how these figures are derived or utilized in the system. Specifically, while the linked use case mentions CLV averages for Google Ads and Instagram customers, it lacks detailed evidence of how these values are calculated or their impact on overall customer behavior and business decisions. This indicates a gap in the evidence needed to satisfy the requirement for validating CLV.
gaps: Lack of detailed evidence on how CLV is calculated and its application in business decisions.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Provide detailed CLV calculation methodology
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define the calculation method for CLV and how it is used in reporting.
